creator: acieroid@awesom.eu
text:
Right, this port never existed. The last line should be "install the
graphics/zathura-pdf-poppler port." though (the word 'port' is
missing), or the 'the' should be removed. And thanks for the other
improvements, I totally forgot to update PORTREVISION and didn't know
about the new options framework.

On 23 January 2013 14:34, Guido Falsi <madpilot@freebsd.org> wrote:
> I just noticed another detail which needs to be fixed in the port.
>
> The pkg-message makes a reference to the dead port
> graphics/zathura-pdf-mupdf. I removed such reference.
>
> Attaching a revised patch.
>
> Thanks.
>
> --
> Guido Falsi <madpilot@FreeBSD.org>
